resources.string: Set up this display from your phone
Scan the QR code to open the TV\'s direct local setup page, or open the local address manually and enter the pairing code shown here.
1. Connect your phone to the same Wi-Fi or Ethernet network.
2. Scan the QR code or open the local address and enter the pairing code.
3. Apply a display URL or JSON config to update the screen.
Pair code will appear once the local address is ready.
QR opens the local TV page directly
